scripts.deploy: expo export --platform web && powershell -Command "(Get-Content dist/index.html) -replace '/_expo', '_expo' -replace '/favicon.ico', 'favicon.ico' | Set-Content dist/index.html" && powershell -Command "Get-ChildItem -Path dist/_expo/static/js/web -Filter *.js | ForEach-Object { (Get-Content $_.FullName) -replace '\"/assets/node_modules/', '\"assets/node_modules/' -replace '\"/assets/assets/', '\"assets/assets/' | Set-Content $_.FullName }" && powershell -Command "New-Item dist/.nojekyll -ItemType File -Force" && powershell -Command "Set-Content dist/.gitignore ''" && gh-pages --no-history --dotfiles -d dist
